case_title: GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE CO. vs. BATTEAO, JIHAD M. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATTEAO, JIHAD M. $5,001.41 PRINCIPAL, $152.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,153.91
